summary: Successfully verified mobile UI fixes for member-pages. Add Product/Menu Item buttons are now visible and clickable on mobile (375x812 viewport). Sticky header keeps buttons visible on scroll. Modal slides from bottom with proper safe-area handling. Runtime URL detection implemented in runtimeConfig.js and used across member-pages components.
critical_code_review_comments: Runtime URL detection correctly implemented in runtimeConfig.js with getApiUrl(), getWsUrl(), getFrontendUrl()
getApiBase() function duplicated in MemberPageDashboard.jsx, memberPagesApi.js, BottomNav.jsx - could be consolidated to use runtimeConfig.js imports
Sticky header uses 'sticky top-0 z-10' classes - working correctly
pb-32 (128px) bottom padding applied to Items container to clear bottom nav (~80px)
Modal uses 'flex items-end md:items-center' for mobile bottom slide animation
Close button (X) added to modal header for mobile users
Safe-area handling added with paddingBottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom)
seed_data_creation: Created two test pages: 'Mobile Test Store' (mpage_66a0abdd8833) and 'Mobile Test Restaurant' (mpage_73d329ef4bf5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UI fixes verified working on member-pages. Test pages created during testing. Bottom navigation no longer blocks Add buttons. runtimeConfig.js provides centralized URL detection.

mobile_ui_add_button.details: Add Product button at y=136, bottom nav at y=~732. Button is 552px above bottom nav.
mobile_ui_add_button.sticky_header: Working - button stays at y=61 after scrolling

mobile_modal_behavior.details: Modal has items-end class for bottom slide, rounded-t-2xl for mobile presentation, close button (X) present

bottom_padding_fix.details: pb-32 (128px) bottom padding applied to Items container
